location: Dropped by Azula Beastman enemies found in the two rooms directly past the Crumbling Beast Grave Site of Grace in Crumbling Farum Azula — turn right on leaving the grace room. Seven Beastmen carry the weapon across both rooms.
tactics: From the Crumbling Beast Grave grace, turn right; the Beastmen are split across the next two rooms
Four of them are crouched eating and stay passive until you attack or approach their heads, letting you pick off targets one at a time
They hit hard and can gang up fast in the tight rooms — fight from a doorway/chokepoint rather than out in the open
Drop rate is low (roughly 2%), so plan on resting at the grace and re-clearing the rooms several times
lore: Cast from plain, dull iron and carried by the beastmen native to Farum Azula, this sword is heavier than most curved blades but well-balanced enough that it's surprisingly approachable given the damage it deals.

builds.name: Strength-forward curved sword
builds.why: Rare C-scaling in Strength (with only E in Dexterity) makes it one of the few curved swords that actually rewards a Strength-heavy investment instead of Dexterity.
